name: skill-test-lifecycle-chain-runner
title: Skill test lifecycle chain runner MVP
description: Add explicit linear chain execution for lifecycle-tagged skill test drafts, with chain-level audit, fail-fast sequencing, bounded carry-forward, and shared environment orchestration.
creator: 菲比啾比
notes: Closed after the linear chain runner, live SSE progress, continuation policy, and related Skill Tests UI hooks landed under the umbrella task; final manual acceptance covered the current chain execution and observability flow.

keyRisks: chain-level run audit must link cleanly to per-step skill_test_runs without breaking existing single-case views
shared environment bootstrap/teardown must be explicit and fail closed on partial setup or cleanup errors
runner must bound carry-forward context so chain execution does not silently turn into free-form shared conversation state
